value.title: A DIFFERENT WAY TO FIND CONNECTION
value.desc: Instead of endless swiping, Clique sends you one carefully selected match each week. Someone who actually fits your life, not just your preferences.

intake.title: START WITH A QUICK INTRODUCTION
intake.desc: In just 1–2 minutes, share a few basic details about yourself and what you're looking for. This helps Clique understand your direction.

membership.title: BECOME A CLIQUE MEMBER
membership.desc: A small membership (650,000đ / 3 months) gives you access to a high-quality environment. It ensures everyone you meet is intentional and ready to show up.

matching.title: WE GET TO KNOW YOU DEEPLY
matching.desc: Answer questions about your values and lifestyle. This allows Clique to filter thousands of profiles and select the one that fits you best.

weekly_match.title: ONE MATCH. EVERY WEEK.
weekly_match.desc: Each week, you’ll receive one carefully curated match, along with the reason why you two could work. You have 7 days to decide if you want to meet.

payment.title: SECURE YOUR MEETING
payment.desc: Once you both agree to meet, a small reservation fee (120,000đ) is required to ensure intentionality. This leads to scheduling the final time and place.

meeting_flow.title: FROM MATCH TO REAL MEETING
meeting_flow.desc: If both choose to meet, Clique arranges the time, place, and setting. You simply focus on the conversation, everything else is handled.

data_depth.title: DEEP DATA ANALYSIS
data_depth.desc: We don't just look at age or location. We analyze your values, personality traits, and life goals to find true compatibility.

psychological_fit.title: PSYCHOLOGICAL FIT
psychological_fit.desc: Our logic factors in complementary traits—like how your warmth balances their steadiness—to ensure a relationship that feels grounded.

human_curation.title: HUMAN-AI SYNERGY
human_curation.desc: Clique combines advanced matching logic with high-level human curation to verify that every connection is meaningful.
